meaning: n.巴洛克时期艺术和建筑风格的,巴洛克式adj.巴洛克式的,结构复杂的,形式怪样的
examples: The baroque church of San Leonardo is worth a quick look.
It looks like a baroque palace from Prague or Munich enlarged a hundred times.
They gradually stopped performing any kind of Baroque music on the piano, even Scarlatti's.
Strap a gargoyle on the corner and you would think you were in baroque Europe.
We're in the baroque oyster bar, one of the loveliest rooms in Britain, complete with ghost.
